setup_task.sh creates this file at exactly this path with CSV content

CSV audit file contains 11 rows total: 10 actual corrections (3 building addresses/cities + 2 floor reassignments + 2 room reassignments + 1 duplicate + 2 description corrections) + 1 contamination trap row

Task includes ROOM-CONTAM-001 as a deliberate contamination check - a legitimate room that appears similar to a duplicate but must be preserved. Verified in setup_task.sh (line 102, 112, 179) and verifier.py (lines 142-155)

privileged_info_summary: The spatial_hierarchy_remediation task is a synthetic task involving data quality corrections in OpenMaint (CMDBuild-based facilities management system). The occupation is correctly classified as Maintenance and Repair Workers (SOC 49-9071.00) within the Facilities Support Services industry. The task contains exactly 10 required corrections: 3 building address/city corrections, 2 floor building reassignments, 2 room floor reassignments, 1 duplicate room deletion, and 2 room description corrections. The task intentionally includes a contamination prevention mechanism with ROOM-CONTAM-001, which is a legitimate room that must not be deleted despite appearing similar to a duplicate.
